fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-07.description: Fix: persist brightness, colour temperature, and on/off state across restarts. Build passed. PR attempted via safeoutputs.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI

notes: 2026-07-01 run (13:38 UTC): Tasks 4+3. Task 3: (a) Commented on #24 with HDR investigation - explained AllowsTransparency blocks HDR, recommended Option A (WinUI Composition). (b) Implemented brightness/colortemp/isLightOn persistence fix - added 3 new AppSettings properties, load in constructor, apply visually in Window_Loaded, save on each change. Build passed. Branch: repo-assist/fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-07-01. safeoutputs create_pull_request returned patch file (PR may or may not have been created on GitHub - check for new item after #103). Task 4: Skipped (Updatum bump already documented in #97, all other engineering items already have open issues).
